Professional A-Frame Signs A-Frame solutions for effective sidewalk advertising. These durable, weather-resistant double-sided signs feature full-color printing on corrugated plastic with sturdy holders. Perfect for restaurants, retail stores, and small businesses seeking cost-effective outdoor marketing. Easy setup, maintenance-free operation, and excellent visibility for both foot and vehicle traffic. ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Standard configurator labels apply for size, quantity, material, and design upload options. ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Product Overview

Our A-Frame Signs A-Frame provide professional sidewalk advertising solutions that combine durability with visual impact. Each sign features full-color printing on 4mm corrugated plastic, designed to withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant graphics. These portable sandwich board signs offer double-sided visibility, maximizing exposure to both pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

Available in multiple configurations including the signicade deluxe a frame white and signicade deluxe a frame black models. The waterproof construction ensures reliable performance in various weather conditions, while the lightweight design allows for easy repositioning throughout the day. Perfect for businesses requiring flexible, maintenance-free outdoor signage that delivers consistent marketing results.

Choose from standard sizes or custom dimensions to match your specific advertising needs. Each unit includes sturdy sign holders engineered for stability and wind resistance, ensuring your message remains visible and professional in all conditions.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Material Options

Our A-Frame Signs A-Frame utilize premium 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) for optimal durability and print quality. This lightweight yet sturdy material provides excellent resistance to weather, UV rays, and daily handling while maintaining crisp, vibrant graphics throughout extended outdoor use.

The corrugated plastic construction offers superior strength-to-weight ratio compared to traditional materials, ensuring easy transport and setup without sacrificing stability. The smooth surface accepts full-color digital printing beautifully, delivering sharp text and vibrant images that attract customer attention effectively.

Sign holders are constructed from durable materials designed to secure panels firmly while allowing quick sign changes when needed. This material combination provides long-lasting performance for businesses requiring reliable outdoor advertising solutions that maintain professional appearance over time.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Finishing Options

Professional finishing enhances the durability and appearance of your A-Frame Signs A-Frame. Full-color digital printing provides vibrant, fade-resistant graphics that maintain visual impact throughout extended outdoor exposure. The smooth coroplast surface ensures even ink coverage and sharp detail reproduction.

Double-sided printing maximizes visibility from all directions, essential for effective sidewalk advertising. Weather-resistant coating protects against moisture, UV damage, and everyday wear while preserving color integrity. Precision cutting ensures proper fit within sign holders for professional presentation.

Optional lamination provides additional protection for high-traffic locations or harsh weather conditions. All finishing processes are designed to complement the portable nature of A-frame systems while delivering the professional quality businesses need for effective outdoor marketing campaigns.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Production Times

Choose from flexible production schedules ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet your timeline requirements. Rush production available for urgent projects, while standard timing provides cost-effective solutions for planned campaigns. Production begins immediately upon artwork approval for orders submitted before 5:00 PM CST.

Digital printing technology enables quick turnaround without compromising quality. Proof requests add one business day to production schedules but ensure complete satisfaction before printing begins. Orders requiring custom sizing may require additional production time depending on specifications.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Payment Options

Convenient payment processing accepts major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts for seamless ordering. Secure checkout protects sensitive information while providing immediate order confirmation and tracking details. Net terms available for qualified business customers with credit approval.

Volume pricing automatically applies to larger quantities, providing cost savings for multiple sign orders or replacement panels. Quote requests available for custom projects or bulk orders requiring special pricing consideration. All transactions processed securely with immediate confirmation and receipt delivery.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Shipping Guidelines

Professional packaging ensures safe delivery of your A-Frame Signs A-Frame. Standard shipping typically delivers within 3-7 business days, with expedited options available for urgent projects. Tracking information provided automatically upon shipment for complete order visibility.

Large or multiple units may require freight delivery depending on size and quantity. Replacement signs ship efficiently in compact packaging, while complete frame units require specialized handling to prevent damage during transit. Free shipping available on qualifying orders over minimum purchase amounts.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Common Uses

Restaurants utilize A-Frame Signs A-Frame for daily specials, menu highlights, and promotional offers that attract sidewalk traffic. Retail stores showcase sales events, new arrivals, and seasonal promotions with easily changeable signage. Professional services advertise hours, services, and special offers to increase foot traffic and customer awareness.

Real estate agents display property information and open house details with portable, professional signage. Event organizers direct attendees and promote activities with weather-resistant outdoor displays. Small businesses benefit from cost-effective advertising that requires no permanent installation or permits.

The versatile design works effectively for temporary promotions, permanent location marketing, and seasonal campaigns. Easy repositioning allows businesses to optimize placement for maximum visibility throughout different times of day or varying traffic patterns.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

A-Frame Signs A-Frame Artwork Requirements

Upload high-resolution artwork files in standard formats including PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG/PNG. Minimum 300 DPI resolution ensures crisp printing quality for professional results. Color mode should be CMYK for accurate color reproduction in digital printing processes.

Design templates available for each sign size, providing proper dimensions and bleed areas for optimal results. Online design tool allows custom creation directly on our website with professional templates and graphics library. Include 0.125" bleed on all sides for edge-to-edge printing coverage.

Free proof available upon request to verify design accuracy before production begins. Our design team provides artwork assistance and file optimization services to ensure the best possible printing results.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Maximize your business visibility with professional A-Frame Signs A-Frame that deliver consistent marketing results. These versatile sidewalk signs provide the perfect combination of durability, portability, and visual impact for businesses seeking effective outdoor advertising solutions. The weather-resistant construction ensures reliable performance while the double-sided design maximizes exposure to potential customers.

Consider complementary display options including retractors and other banner stands for comprehensive marketing campaigns. Whether you need single units for specific promotions or multiple signs for ongoing advertising, our A-Frame Signs A-Frame provide the professional quality and reliability your business deserves. Order today to start attracting more customers with effective sidewalk advertising.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Signs A-Frame

What do people call an A-frame sign?

A-frame signs are commonly called sandwich board signs, sidewalk signs, or pavement signs. These terms all refer to the same portable, double-sided display system that businesses use for outdoor advertising. The "A-frame" name comes from the shape of the supporting structure that resembles the letter "A" when viewed from the side.

What are A-frame signs made of?

Our A-frame signs feature 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) panels with full-color digital printing, paired with durable sign holders. This lightweight yet sturdy material provides excellent weather resistance and maintains vibrant graphics throughout extended outdoor use. The holders are constructed from materials designed for stability and easy sign changes.

Are A-frame signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes, these signs are completely waterproof and engineered for outdoor use in various weather conditions. The corrugated plastic material resists moisture, UV rays, and temperature fluctuations while maintaining structural integrity. The weather-resistant printing ensures colors remain vibrant even with continuous outdoor exposure and cleaning.

Are A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes, our A-frame signs feature double-sided printing for maximum visibility from all directions. This design ensures your message reaches both foot traffic and vehicle traffic approaching from either direction. Double-sided capability maximizes your advertising investment by providing twice the exposure area on a single sign.

What is the largest A-frame sign size available?

The largest standard A-frame sign size available is 36" × 24" used with our Signicade Deluxe models. This size provides excellent visibility for businesses requiring maximum impact while maintaining portability for daily setup and storage. Custom sizes may be available depending on specific project requirements and frame compatibility.

Can I order replacement signs for my A-frame frame?

Yes, replacement signs are available for all our A-frame systems, allowing you to update promotions, seasonal offers, or menu changes cost-effectively. Simply specify your frame model when ordering to ensure proper fit. This flexibility makes A-frame systems an economical long-term advertising solution for businesses with changing promotional needs.
